steps.title: Spot the result-showing relationship
steps.content: The sentence pairs a problematic payment system (recipients weren't always willing or able to pay) with its direct consequences: slow/arduous collection and accumulated unpaid mail. The transition must show that the second part follows as a result of the first.

steps.title: Find the consequence word
steps.content: Consequently directly expresses this cause-and-effect relationship. Regardless, On the contrary, and For example express contradiction, contrast, and illustration—none show how one thing results from another. This matches choice C — C is correct.
